isolation.socketPolicy: isolated tmux sockets only (-L/-S); default/live socket not used
isolation.tempArtifactsScope: mission evidence dir and ephemeral /tmp paths only

assertions.title: Quick relaunch uses last-agent and current caller path

steps.action: Launch opencode in W1 via launch-menu with w1-initial path
steps.expected: Initial launch records opencode from W1 initial path
steps.observed: assert_equals passed for initial launch path (commands.log lines 65-69)

steps.action: Run quick-relaunch in W1 with changed caller path w1-relaunch
steps.expected: Relaunch uses last-agent opencode from new caller path without picker

evidence.checks: initial launch + quick relaunch path assertions succeeded

assertions.title: Quick relaunch without usable history is non-destructive

steps.action: Clear @workspace_agent_last_agent and remove state file, then run quick-relaunch
steps.expected: No process launched when no history exists
steps.observed: line count unchanged (2 -> 2), assertion passed (commands.log lines 111-115)

steps.action: Set stale last-agent ghostagent with unavailable PATH, then run quick-relaunch
steps.expected: No process launched and last-agent state preserved
steps.observed: no launch count change and last-agent remained ghostagent, both assertions passed (commands.log lines 127-136)

evidence.checks: no-history and stale-history non-launch assertions + state preservation assertion succeeded

steps.action: Launch in W1 then quick-relaunch from W2 pane with W2 path
steps.expected: Relaunch uses same agent type from W2 current path, not stale W1 path

steps.action: Read persisted state after W2 relaunch
steps.expected: State reflects active workspace W2 and relaunch path
steps.observed: assert_equals passed for opencode|quickw2|launched|w2-relaunch path (commands.log lines 231-235)

evidence.checks: cross-workspace relaunch path + state workspace assertions succeeded

steps.action: Run stale-history quick-relaunch attempt with unavailable command
steps.expected: Failure path does not launch process

steps.action: Without restarting tmux, run launch-menu opencode and then quick-relaunch
steps.expected: Subsequent launch/relaunch succeeds from same namespace
steps.observed: recovery launch and recovery quick-relaunch assertions passed (commands.log lines 163-166, 193-196)

steps.action: Check resulting state after recovery sequence
steps.observed: final state assertion includes last_status=launched (commands.log lines 231-235)

evidence.checks: failure branch non-launch + recovery launch/relaunch + final launched state assertions succeeded

frictions.description: tmux display-message feedback strings are ephemeral and not directly persisted by this test script; validation relied on scripted non-launch/state assertions captured in xtrace.
frictions.resolution: Captured full bash -x trace to commands.log and mapped assertion outcomes from explicit assert checks.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions via isolated tmux socket quick-relaunch script: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
